name: gate-rules-yaml-schema
tags: gate rules yaml schema name_arg input_arg prereq config external task:84e4fc39
body:
~/.claude/gate_rules.yaml schema:

  tool:      (required) short tool name, e.g. imessage__send
  prereq:    (required) tool that must have been called recently
  window_s:  seconds to look back (default 120)
  name_arg:  key in the PREREQ tool's input whose value must appear in the prompt
  input_arg: key in the GATED tool's own input whose value must appear in the prompt

name_arg and input_arg are mutually exclusive in practice:
- name_arg: used when prereq is a lookup (contacts__search name='Alice')
- input_arg: used when the relevant value is on the gated call itself (mail__compose to='x@y.com')

**How to apply:** Check existing entries as reference. input_arg check runs before prereq scan — fail fast.
